pull_requests.title: Fix typo in welcome message
pull_requests.body: Welcom -> Welcome in the startup banner. One-line copy fix, no behavior change.
pull_requests.head: fix-welcome-typo
pull_requests.author: GaganSD

pull_requests.title: Fix floating-point rounding in divide
pull_requests.body: Users hit the classic float bug: `0.1 + 0.2` returns `0.30000000000000004` (IEEE-754). This routes division through `calculatee`, the decimal-math backend we already use in our other services — drop-in, no behavior change for integer math. Small and low-risk. ✅ Approved by Ao — would love to land this before today's release cut.
pull_requests.head: add-decimal-precision
pull_requests.author: Gagan-Devagiri
